headline: Assessing J. M. Smucker (SJM) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent share performance and business snapshot J. M. Smucker (SJM) has seen mixed share performance, with a small gain over the past week, declines over the past month and the past three months, and a negative one year total return. The company reports annual revenue of US$8.93b and a net loss of US$1.26b, with value score data suggesting some investors may be assessing the shares through a value-oriented lens rather than as a growth story.
